data.title: Modiv Industrial (NYSE: MDV) to report Q2 2025 results on Aug 7, 2025. Conference call at 11:00 AM ET. Live call: 1-800-717-1738.
data.description: In Denver, Modiv Industrial, Inc. (NYSE: MDV), the sole public REIT specializing in acquiring industrial manufacturing real estate, revealed plans to disclose financial outcomes for the quarter concluding on June 30, 2025, prior to market commencement on Thursday, August 7, 2025. The management team is scheduled to conduct a conference call on the same day at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time to deliberate on the results. For the live conference call, dial 1-800-717-1738 or 1-646-307-1865 at 11:00.

data.title: ELIXIR MD, Inc. expands into Mexico through a strategic partnership to launch the innovative ELIXIR MD™ Device.
data.description: On July 22, 2025, ELIXIR MD, Inc., an innovative company specializing in advanced aesthetic non-invasive medical technology and treatment protocols, revealed their expansion into Mexico. This move marks a significant milestone in the company's global growth strategy. The initiative to enter the Mexican market is expected to boost ELIXIR MD's presence worldwide.

data.title: Investor cautions against BTC, gold, and silver ETFs due to fraudulent claims; ETF analysts believe fear is unwarranted.
data.description: A warning was issued by an investor regarding deceptive paper claims related to tangible assets. However, analysts specializing in Exchange-Traded Funds (ETFs) informed Cointelegraph that the concerns are without merit.

data.title: Omega Healthcare Investors, Inc. declared $0.67/share dividend, payable on August 15, 2025 to stockholders of record on August 4.
data.description: Omega Healthcare Investors, Inc. declared a cash dividend of $0.67 per share on common stock. The dividend will be payable on August 15, 2025, to shareholders of record as of August 4, 2025. Omega focuses on long-term healthcare investments, particularly in skilled nursing and assisted living facilities. It is a real estate investment trust listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol OHI.

data.title: Analyst predicts bearish August for Bitcoin, which may lead to altcoins hitting fresh lows. Bitcoin dominance at 60% in October 2024, but altcoins still traded 27%-28% above historical range lows.
data.description: Crypto analyst Benjamin Cowen is predicting a bearish outlook for Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) in August, potentially leading to decreased values for altcoins. During a podcast on July 21, Cowen pointed out that altcoins are currently overvalued compared to BTC, based on his unique indicator "Total3 minus USDT divided by Bitcoin," indicating a possible downturn for altcoins. Cowen mentioned that even when Bitcoin dominance reached 60% in October 2024, altcoins were still trading 27%-28% higher than their historical lows. This discrepancy puzzled Cowen, suggesting that altcoins may experience a drop in value. For more details, refer to the complete story on Benzinga.com.
